W

W - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest

WebService - Class in com.pax.poslink
This class implements communication with a Web server for getting the device IP address.

construction method

construction method
WebService.METHOD - Enum in com.pax.poslink
indicate the HTTP method

Attribute: ans...12

WltID - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.AddlRspData
WltID for MasterCard.
WorkMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest.CustomMACInformation
MAC calculation mode:
0 - ANSI X9.9
1 - Hypercomm Fast Mode
2 - ANSI X9.19.
WorkMode - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ManageRequest
Key Calculation Work Mode.
Default is 0.
If Type is DES/TDES:
0: DES/TDES ECB Encryption.

WrightExpressAmount of SAF SUMMARY REPORT
WrightExpressCount - Variable in class com.pax.poslink.ReportResponse

writeBlock(int, byte[]) - Method in class com.pax.poslink.peripheries.tech.MifareClassic
